title: Support log-opt max-file in Podman
body:
### Feature request description

When running podman with `--log-opt k8s-file` there is an option `--log-opt max-size` but I don't see an option `--log-opt max-file` to rotate files (in Docker: https://docs.docker.com/config/containers/logging/local/#options)
Does Podman have it? If not - can we add a support for rotating `ctr.log`?

### Suggest potential solution

Podman supports log rotating for multiple files with option  `--log-opt max-size`  like in Docker

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Nope

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
This would need to be wired into containers/conmon I believe to make this work.  Not a priority on anyones queue.  Interested in opening a PR for this?
